'''Kurets''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small, brown-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Insect/Legends|insects]], approximately one [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeter]] long, found on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. They possessed a [[Hive mind/Legends|hive-based mentality]] and were often found in swarms. This made them dangerous as they had the ability to coordinate their attacks via [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromones]], and especially because of their sharp pincers.

They were prized as food by the [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]], though they were untamed, which made them somewhat of an expensive meal.
